chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Inheritance of Grandfathers and Grandmothers

text: 5625 - رَوَى يَحْيَى بْنُ أَبِي عِمْرَانَ عَنْ يُونُسَ عَنْ رَجُلٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : "اَلْجَدُّ وَ اَلْجَدَّةُ مِنْ قِبَلِ اَلْأَبِ وَ اَلْجَدُّ وَ اَلْجَدَّةُ مِنْ قِبَلِ اَلْأُمِّ كُلُّهُمْ يَرِثُونَ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.5625 - Yahya ibn Abi Imran narrated from Yunus from a man who narrated from Abu Abdullah (as) that he said: "The grandfather and grandmother from the father's side and the grandfather and grandmother from the mother's side - all of them inherit."
